visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a green t-shirt stands against a plain white wall. He is talking energetically, using hand gestures like pointing and holding up fingers to emphasize his points. His facial expressions are animated. (2) The man crosses his arms in front of his chest in an 'X' shape. A digital graphic of a smartphone cross-section appears in the center of the frame, showing various layers labeled with text. (3) The graphic disappears, and the man continues his energetic monologue, clapping his hands together and making circular motions with his fingers while talking directly to the camera. He wears a beaded bracelet and a bright yellow watch.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 網傳呢. (2) [Slogan]: iPhone17因為有七層抗反射鍍膜 所以貼保貼會把它破壞掉 真的嗎?. (3) [Variety]: 答案 錯. (4) [Subtitle]: 怎麼說 手機的表面 有AF的鍍膜層底下才有AR的抗反射的鍍膜層 AF鍍膜層 是在AR抗反射層的上面 所以不會脫落 但如果你沒有貼保護貼的話 你日後使用哦 表面AF層如果脫落了 反而會造成你的鍍膜層一些刮傷 得不償失 但是要 怎麼樣去 選擇好的 保貼呢 非常重要 就關鍵在膠上面了 你的膠的 選擇要對 你呢 選擇的Silicone的膠 不要選擇 OCA的膠 黏在手機螢幕上 怎麼說 因為OCA的膠 它的那個OCA的膠啊 它是高黏的 黏度1000g 但是silicon膠是比較弱貼 約在20g以下 所以比較ok.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged male wearing a green t-shirt with 'Roots Athletics' logo, a grey patterned cap, glasses, a wooden bead bracelet, and a yellow smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist white wall with no distinctive features or furniture.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male narrator speaks in a fast, energetic tone with high articulation clarity. His voice is dominant over a low-volume, mid-tempo lo-fi background music track featuring electronic percussion and a subtle synth melody. The environment sounds completely silent, characteristic of a professional studio recording. (2) The narrator's tone shifts to a brief authoritative declaration, with the volume of his speech remaining high and projected. The BGM continues steadily in the background without any rhythmic shifts. (3) The detailed technical explanation continues at a steady, rapid pace. The acoustic texture remains bright and clear, with the narrator's vocal cadence perfectly synced with the casual beat of the background music. No incidental noises or heavy SFX interfere with the speech signal.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Fact-Check -> Technical Explanation -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To debunk a rumor regarding iPhone 17's screen coating and provide technical advice on choosing appropriate screen protectors based on adhesive types.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: General technical advice and debunking of a rumor without promoting a specific product purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A standard educational tech short video featuring a well-known tech creator providing maintenance tips.
